eas_text: A civil authority has issued A REQUIRED MONTHLY TEST for the following counties or areas: Summit, UT; at 1:46 PM on JAN 18, 2019 Effective until 2:46 PM. Message from WSLF/CAP.
extra_text: This is a test of the Park City/Summit County Emergency Alert System.  In the event of an emergency, this system would bring you important information.  This concludes the test.
